test.command: bun test && bunx vitest run --config dashboard/vitest.config.ts
test.details: 183 backend tests pass (schema: 14, health: 3, projects: 22, tasks: 37, agents: 15, claim/release: 16, logs: 26, approvals: 24, approval-review: 25). 322 dashboard tests pass (9 test files). Total: 505 tests pass.

lint.details: Lint not configured yet (placeholder). No actual linting performed.

nonBlockingIssues.description: N+1 query pattern in /api/analytics/agents endpoint fetches all agents then queries tasks per agent. Could be optimized with GROUP BY for larger scale.
UUID_REGEX defined but unused in analytics.ts. project_id filter parameter not validated as UUID format.

Inconsistent time calculation semantics: avgTimeToCompletionMs uses created_at→updated_at (full lifecycle) while avgCompletionTimeMs uses claimed_at→updated_at (agent work time). Different labels on frontend somewhat mitigate confusion.
Partial data error states not surfaced — if one analytics query fails while others succeed, no per-section error indicator is shown.
DonutChart resize handler calls scheduleRender with a no-op that only clears canvas. Chart flashes blank on resize until data changes trigger re-render.
Date filtering inconsistency: /agents, /tasks, /time-tracking use tasks.createdAt, but /velocity uses tasks.updatedAt. Intentional but could confuse users.
project_id query parameter on analytics endpoints not validated as UUID format. Invalid UUID returns empty results instead of 400.
Date range filters not forwarded to export task query. Export only respects project filter. TaskQueryParams interface doesn't support date filtering.
CSV column count test uses simple split(',') which doesn't handle quoted fields correctly.

appliedUpdates.description: Added analytics API endpoints (/api/analytics/agents, /tasks, /time-tracking, /velocity) to architecture.md REST API section
Added export date filter gap to known-issues.md — date range filters are not applied to exported task lists

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update frontend-worker skill step 3: replace 'bun run dev:all' reference with instructions to use services.yaml start commands (separate api and dashboard services). Also clarify TDD procedure — current skill says 'Write tests first (RED)' but workers consistently implement then test.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both analytics-charts and export-functionality reviewers noted that 'bun run dev:all' is not a defined script. Three reviewers across milestones have noted TDD procedure deviations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify inline styles vs CSS modules/Tailwind convention. AGENTS.md mentions CSS modules or Tailwind but the established pattern in dashboard components is inline style objects.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: analytics-charts reviewer noted all styling in Charts.tsx and Analytics.tsx uses inline style={{}} despite AGENTS.md listing 'CSS modules or Tailwind for styling'. Pre-existing pattern from earlier milestones.

rejectedObservations.observation: Analytics query pattern uses JS-level aggregation instead of SQL GROUP BY
rejectedObservations.reason: Already-documented pattern. The architecture.md 'Patterns & Conventions' section notes business logic patterns. This is a known performance trade-off accepted across the codebase.

rejectedObservations.observation: Velocity endpoint defaults to 30 days while other analytics endpoints default to all-time
rejectedObservations.reason: Intentional design decision documented in code. Velocity is inherently time-bounded by nature.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml already correctly documents api and dashboard services
rejectedObservations.reason: Not an observation requiring action — confirmation that services.yaml is correct.
